channel.title: Predictive Analytics on
channel.description: Recent content in Predictive Analytics on

item.title: AI in Marketing
item.description: Marketing is undergoing a seismic shift, driven by the rapid evolution of artificial intelligence (AI). From predictive analytics to lifelike (scary) automation, AI tools are revolutionizing how businesses engage with audiences, streamline workflows, and achieve measurable results. What is AI in Marketing? AI in marketing involves using artificial intelligence to optimize strategies through automation, data analysis, and personalized customer experiences. By leveraging machine learning, natural language processing, and predictive insights, marketers can improve efficiency, increase ROI, and craft meaningful connections with their audience.
